item.description:
Programming and Statistics in R (2020 – 2022, undergraduate lecture and tutorial, University of Munich)

Laboratory Phonology (2020 & 2022, graduate lecture, University of Munich)

Advanced Speech Technology (2019 & 2021, graduate lecture, University of Munich)

Dynamic Methods to Investigate Aspiration (2021, workshop for PhD students, University of Michigan)

Introduction to Programming in R and tidyverse (2020, workshop for PhD students, University of Munich)

Introduction to Linear Regression and Mixed Models in R (2020, workshop for PhD students, University of Munich)
